hooks.statusMessage: Running Python quality checks (ruff + pyright + pytest)...
hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [[ "$f" == *.py ]] || exit 0; echo '--- ruff format ---'; ruff format "$f" 2>&1; echo '--- ruff check ---'; ruff check --fix "$f" 2>&1; echo '--- pyright ---'; pyright "$f" 2>&1; echo '--- pytest ---'; pytest --tb=short -q 2>&1 || true
